'''âv-k-v-h''' ('''kavakvehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:antidote|antidote]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-k-v-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:antidote|antidote]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-k-v-h
|-
! Lemma
| kavakvehoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivakvehoko|thivakvehoko]] || [[word:jivakvehoko|jivakvehoko]] || [[word:shivakvehoko|shivakvehoko]] || [[word:kivakvehoko|kivakvehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvakvehoko|thuthuvakvehoko]] || [[word:jujuvakvehoko|jujuvakvehoko]] || [[word:shushuvakvehoko|shushuvakvehoko]] || [[word:kukuvakvehoko|kukuvakvehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvakvehoko|thuvakvehoko]] || [[word:juvakvehoko|juvakvehoko]] || [[word:shuvakvehoko|shuvakvehoko]] || [[word:kuvakvehoko|kuvakvehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvakvehoko|thuvakvehoko]] || [[word:juvakvehoko|juvakvehoko]] || [[word:shuvakvehoko|shuvakvehoko]] || [[word:kuvakvehoko|kuvakvehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevakvehoko|thevakvehoko]] || [[word:jevakvehoko|jevakvehoko]] || [[word:shevakvehoko|shevakvehoko]] || [[word:kevakvehoko|kevakvehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovakvehoko|thothovakvehoko]] || [[word:jojovakvehoko|jojovakvehoko]] || [[word:shoshovakvehoko|shoshovakvehoko]] || [[word:kokovakvehoko|kokovakvehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovakvehoko|thovakvehoko]] || [[word:jovakvehoko|jovakvehoko]] || [[word:shovakvehoko|shovakvehoko]] || [[word:kovakvehoko|kovakvehoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovakvehoko|thovakvehoko]] || [[word:jovakvehoko|jovakvehoko]] || [[word:shovakvehoko|shovakvehoko]] || [[word:kovakvehoko|kovakvehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvakvehoko|thĂŠvakvehoko]] || [[word:jĂŠvakvehoko|jĂŠvakvehoko]] || [[word:shĂŠvakvehoko|shĂŠvakvehoko]] || [[word:kĂŠvakvehoko|kĂŠvakvehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavakvehoko|thathavakvehoko]] || [[word:jajavakvehoko|jajavakvehoko]] || [[word:shashavakvehoko|shashavakvehoko]] || [[word:kakavakvehoko|kakavakvehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavakvehoko|thavakvehoko]] || [[word:javakvehoko|javakvehoko]] || [[word:shavakvehoko|shavakvehoko]] || [[word:kavakvehoko|kavakvehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavakvehoko|thavakvehoko]] || [[word:javakvehoko|javakvehoko]] || [[word:shavakvehoko|shavakvehoko]] || [[word:kavakvehoko|kavakvehoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
